2023-24 Cal State Bakersfield Roadrunners Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-19 (8-12, 9th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Rod Barnes

PS/G: 68.7 (306th of 362)

PA/G: 69.2 (95th of 362)

SRS: -5.37 (230th of 362)

SOS: -2.17 (182nd of 362)

ORtg: 102.4 (262nd of 362)

DRtg: 103.1 (158th of 362)
